offer: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, disorganized receipts cause late expense reports. We automate expense reporting instead of manual expense tracking and reporting.
problem: Difficulty in tracking and categorizing expenses leads to delayed reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking help
Indie Hackers discussions on expense management
DM outreach to freelancers with demo videos
Engage in community forums for freelancers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try receipt scanning on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer onboarding for first 10 early-access users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Enable CSV import for existing expenses
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
